title: Test Edge 6 (Single to List)
cap_description: Transform single node1 input to list of node4 items
documentation:
## Purpose

Internal test cap. Exercises single-to-list expansion by taking one node1 input and producing a list of node4 items, with optional duplication and item prefix.

## Inputs

- A node1 text file.
- An optional duplication count (default: 1) — how many times the input appears in the output list.
- An optional prefix for each list item.

## Outputs

A list (sequence) of node4 text items.

## Notes

- Not for production use. Used only in capfab test scenarios to verify single-to-sequence routing.

args.arg_description: Path to the input text file
Number of times to duplicate input in list
Prefix to add to each list item
